Class PosInProgram

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.PosInProgram
public class PosInProgram extends Object
this class describes the position of a statement in a program.

  • Method Details

    • getProgramAt

      public static ProgramElement getProgramAt(PosInProgram pos, ProgramElement prg)
      returns the ProgramElement at the given position
      Parameters:
      pos - the PosInProgram
      prg - the ProgramElement we walk through
      Returns:
      the ProgramElement at the given position
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if position pos refers to a non-existent program element

    • depth

      public int depth()
      size of the position list

    • down

      public PosInProgram down(int n)
      descending downwards choosing the n'th statement of the program
      Parameters:
      n - the int describes the position of the statement in the block
      Returns:
      position of the statement

    • up

      public PosInProgram up()
      ascends one AST level

      compares this PosInProgram with another PosInProgram and returns true if both describe the same position
